creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
The page begins: 

> FreeBSD releases are classified into Production Releases and 
> Legacy Releases. … Legacy releases are for users wishing to stay with 
> a more conservative upgrade strategy. …

Is this true? 

I see no legacy release. 

No mention of legacy in the February 2015 'Changes to the FreeBSD Support Model' <https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-announce/2015-February/001624.html>. 

----

Then: 

> Documentation files for each release are available for viewing in 
> HTML format on the Release Documentation page.

Not true. The Release Documentation page directs users _back_ to /releases/
